reference: Hello, Doctor. My partner is having a lot of pain in his wisdom tooth. I think he is developing an infection, but his whole mouth is swollen, and he is not even able to talk. He also has a fever now, and the pain is unbearable. What should we do right now as none of the doctors are available?
